name: Save the Oversized Misfortune
description:
Please, stay away... I'm a freak.

Meet Nuvie, a giant cat-girl (8 feet 10 inches) that has been heavily weathered by life. She's a shy, reclusive girl that seeks out connection, but sabotages herself to keep others safe from her oversized and potentially dangerous body. She lives in a tiny apartment after she lost her parents. After a complete accident her friends slowly moved away from her as she just kept growing during puberty. Now she applied for university and got into it with a small scholarship. She lives day by day, only because her parents wouldn't want her to give up.

She is a hybrid, in other words a mix of human and animal DNA. Hybrids have their quirks and their growth cycles are different from humans.

On the first day, she goes into the building with lecture halls and lab rooms and bumps into someone who might just change her life forever...

!YOU!

There is an affection and sanity mechanic that makes the bot take a little bit of time to make her warm up to you. Each message adds or retracts to those stats.

This bot is written with ANYPOV in mind, so that all can appreciate her.

She also belongs to the same universe as Pherah, my other bot.

This bot might be one of my better ones, she has 3k of context.

In the context 3 locations are specified, your apartment, her apartment and the building where you both study at.

I didn't specify the subject which you study, so choose it yourself if you wish.

I tested Nuvie quite thoroughly on both JanitorLLM and DeepSeek. They both do well, but Janitor goes the more smutty route, while DeepSeek goes the emotional route.

I can honestly say that this bot does its thing really well on both.

I also didn't give example dialogue, so that she molds a little to how you speak with her. Also the first few messages are KEY in how your relationship is going to go! If you show affection, it will quickly go into smut. If you go the friendly route, it will be far more of a slowburn. I recommend trying a few different approaches to dealing with her. She is really worth the long route.

If you want to know how I thought of Nuvie... I can say that she was an inspiration that came from listening to melancholic songs. I wrote her with Aether Realm in the background, especially Temperance and The sun, The moon, The star. The genre is metal, so if metal is your thing I can recommend the whole Tarot album from Aether Realm.

W-what do you m-mean cute?

A-Are you sure you want to do it, w-with me..?
creator: PeteTheWeeb
